name: Forklift from another company hit me at site, can I sue them?
description: Yes, third-party suit for pain/suffering on top of workers' comp.

mainEntity.name: Forklift from another company hit me at site, can I sue them?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, third-party suit for pain/suffering on top of workers' comp.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, file third-party personal injury lawsuit beyond workers' comp for full damages.[5] Context: Targets negligent subcontractors/manufacturers. Key factors: Prove their fault via OSHA; Utah 4-year limit. Practical guidance: Preserve evidence; attorney coordinates both claims. Bigger payouts possible.
